heading: Responsibility of principal for act or omission of agent
label: 223 Responsibility of principal for act or omission of agent
text: When construing and enforcing the provisions of this chapter, the act, omission, or failure of any agent, officer, or other person acting for or employed by any packer, any swine contractor, and any live poultry dealer, stockyard owner, market agency, or dealer, within the scope of his employment or office, shall in every case also be deemed the act, omission, or failure of such packer, any swine contractor, and any live poultry dealer, stockyard owner, market agency, or dealer, as well as that of such agent, officer, or other person.
notes: Amendments2002— inserted “any swine contractor, and” after “packer,” in two places.Pub. L. 107–1711987— substituted “, any live poultry dealer,” for “or any live poultry dealer or handler,” in two places.Pub. L. 100–1731935—Act , title V, § 503, as added , inserted “or any live poultry dealer or handler” after “packer” wherever appearing.Aug. 15, 1921Aug. 14, 1935
Effective Date of 1987 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 100–173section 12 of Pub. L. 100–173section 182 of this titleNov. 23, 1987
